name: Z Special Hidden Whistle
description: Hidden object that jumps you to the secret warp whistle in 1-3

name: Door when P-Switched
description: Door that appears under influence of P-Switch

name: Power-Up Starman
description: Starman (primarily, but also the super suits -- Tanooki, Frog, Hammer)

name: Pipeway Controller
description: Pipe Way Controller (World Map pipe-to-pipe location setter)

name: Wood Platform Rider
description: Log that rides you to the right after stepping on it

name: Goomba in Kuribo's Shoe
description: Goomba in Kuribo's Shoe (yes, I know Kuribo = Goomba, quiet)

name: InvisiLift to Y = 64
description: Invisible (until touched) lift that goes up to fixed position of Y/Hi = 64

name: Hotfoot (Shy)
description: Hot Foot (returns to flame if looked at)

name: Wood Platform Path Wait
description: Wooden platform following path after hopping on

name: Hotfoot (Not Shy, Unused)
description: Hot Foot (randomly walks and stops, doesn't care if you stare)

name: Chain Chomp (Freed)
description: Jumping chain chomp head after he breaks free

name: Cheep Cheep Green
description: Cheep Cheep swims back and forth

name: Lakitu
description: Lakitu throwing red or green spiny eggs

name: Rotary Lift Twirl CW No Stop
Green Piranha Flipped Spits Fire
description: short, upside down, green fire plant

name: Unknown / purposeless
description: Placed on the World 6 Airship, but functionally does nothing

name: Z Event Parabeetles
description: (Level_Event = 4) Begins Green and red parabeetles flyby

name: Cannon Bob-ombs Left
description: Launches fused Bob-ombs to the left

name: Cannon Bob-ombs Right
description: Launches fused Bob-ombs to the right

name: Z Special 3 Green Troopas
description: Spawns up to 3 (depending on available slots) hopping green paratroops

name: Z Special 3 Orange Cheeps (Unused)
description: Spawns up to 3 (depending on available slots) 'lost' orange cheep cheeps (a school)

name: Auto-Scroll
description: Activates horizontal auto scrolling for e.g. World 1-4, World 8 Tank, etc.

name: Bonus Controller
description: Handles the judgement of whether you get a White Toad House / Coin Ship

name: Z Special Toad and King
description: Toad and the king from the end of the world

name: Treasure Set
description: Sets the treasure box item (Level_TreasureItem) based on what row this object is placed at
